description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden coatrack with a simple, utilitarian design. The central vertical post is supported by a sturdy tripod-style base, ensuring stability on flat surfaces. At the top, there are four evenly spaced, curved metal hooks for hanging coats, hats, or bags. The wood has a dark brown finish, giving it a classic and understated appearance suitable for entryways, lobbies, or waiting areas. The hooks are metallic and contrast subtly with the wood, providing both function and a touch of visual interest. There are no visible decorative elements or additional features such as umbrella holders.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden coatrack with four curved metal hooks and a sturdy tripod base. Its design is simple and functional, suitable for entryways or public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing two prominent curved hooks and the central post with the tripod base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the profile of the hooks and the thickness of the central post, with the tripod base seen edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with two hooks visible and the tripod base structure apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile of the hooks and the post.
